text.autoconfig.void_echo.title: Void Echo Settings
message.void_echo.portal_activated: The portal hums with ancient energy!
message.void_echo.echo_warden_summoned: The Echo Warden has been summoned!
message.void_echo.warden_ending: The void falls silent. The Echo Warden is defeated — the ancient darkness has been lifted. You succeeded where the builders of this world failed. But the void whispers one final question: at what cost?
message.void_echo.altar_incomplete: The altar is incomplete. Surround it with Crystal Blocks.
message.void_echo.warden_blink_strike: The Echo Warden blinks through the void!
message.void_echo.warden_phase_three: The Echo Warden enters a frenzied rage!
message.void_echo.warden_echo_wave: The Echo Warden unleashes a devastating wave!
message.void_echo.warden_void_drain: The Echo Warden drains your life force!
message.void_echo.warden_void_nova_charg: The Echo Warden begins charging a Void Nova...
message.void_echo.warden_time_slow: Time bends around the Echo Warden!
message.void_echo.warden_slash: The Echo Warden performs a devastating slash!
message.void_echo.warden_slash_charge: The Echo Warden charges a devastating slash!
message.void_echo.warden_defeated: The Echo Warden crumbles to dust!
message.void_echo.stalker_summon: The Void Stalker summons its minions!
message.void_echo.stalker_enrage: The Void Stalker enters a frenzied rage!
message.void_echo.stalker_defeated: The Void Stalker has been vanquished!
message.void_echo.warden_already_exists: The Echo Warden already lurks nearby!
message.void_echo.echo_shard_1: A voice echoes: 'We built this sanctum to contain the darkness...'
message.void_echo.echo_shard_2: The memory whispers: 'The Void Stalker was once our guardian, now corrupted...'
message.void_echo.echo_shard_3: An ancient record: 'The fortress held for centuries against the void tide...'
message.void_echo.echo_shard_4: Fragments of history: 'The Echo Warden sleeps, awaiting the final summoning...'
message.void_echo.echo_shard_5: The final truth: 'We failed. But you, traveler, may succeed where we could not.'
enchantment.void_echo.void_affinity.desc: Increases damage in the Void's End dimension
enchantment.void_echo.echo_pulse.desc: Chance to emit a sonic burst when damaged
enchantment.void_echo.crystal_shield.des: Reflects projectiles back at the attacker
message.void_echo.crystal_bloom_event: The Crystal Blooms shimmer with renewed energy!
message.void_echo.rift_opened: A Void Rift tears open nearby!
message.void_echo.forge_invalid_item: You cannot upgrade this item at the Void Forge!
message.void_echo.forge_minimal_damage: Item doesn't have enough damage to warrant repair!
message.void_echo.forge_max_durability: This item has reached maximum durability upgrades!
message.void_echo.forge_durability_upgra: Your item has been repaired with crystal energy!
message.void_echo.forge_already_echo: This item already has an Echo upgrade!
message.void_echo.forge_echo_upgraded: Your item has been infused with Echo power!
message.void_echo.forge_already_rift: This item already has a Rift upgrade!
message.void_echo.forge_rift_upgraded: Your item has been infused with Rift energy!
message.void_echo.forge_echo_strike: Echo Strike applied! 10% chance for double damage.
message.void_echo.forge_echo_guard: Echo Guard applied! 10% chance to absorb damage.
message.void_echo.forge_rift_walker: Rift Walker applied! Invisibility while sneaking.
message.void_echo.forge_rift_fury: Rift Fury applied! Strength on kill.
message.void_echo.forge_need_echo_core: Requires an Echo Core in inventory as well.
message.void_echo.forge_need_crystal_blo: Requires a Crystal Block in inventory as well.
message.void_echo.forge_need_catalyst: Requires a Void Catalyst in inventory as well.
